orig.description: A user should be able to quickly charge the device with a cell phone charger.

usecase.pre-condition: Device has a partially depleted battery
usecase.main-event: The device charge indicator blinks to indicate charging
usecase.alternate-event: The user disconnects the device from the charger before charging is complete

performance.description: A battery with <5% capacity shall charge to >95% capacity in <5 hours.

constraint.description: The charge indicator shall be located 1.0 +/- 0.2 cm from the charging port.

behavior.uml:
start :Connect device to charger; fork repeat repeat while (Device disconnected from charger?) is (no) -> yes; fork again repeat split
split again :Blink charge indicator yellow; end split repeat while (Charge complete?) is (no) -> yes; :Charge indicator green; end fork end

verification.description: 1. Connect a device with a low battery to the charger. 1. Confirm charge completes within the specified time limit. 1. Confirm the displays per the diagram. 1. Connect a device with a low battery to the charger. 1. Disconnect the battery prior to the battery completely charging. 1. Confirm the displays per the diagram.

architecture.uml:
node "Charging subsystem" { [Data port] -- [Data port] -- (int-3)
[Power port] -- [Power port] --
[LEDs] --
[Device housing] --
[PCB] -- [LEDs] [PCB] -- [Data port] [PCB] -- [Power port] }
node Computer node User node "Power supply" as PS
Computer ..> (int-3): use User ..> : use PS ..> : use
architecture.description: A power port accessible by the user and used to charge the device.

interface.description: The device connects to a power supply via a connector for charging.
interface.mechanical: The power interface shall be a micro-USB power connector.
The power supply shall contain the plug, the device shall contain the jack.
interface.electrical: The device shall receive 1A max, 5V +/- 25mV via the power interface.

interface.description: The device has a physical port on the front panel for charging.
interface.mechanical: LED shall fit a 3.1 mm diameter hole on the housing.
LED shall be yellow in color.
interface.electrical: The LED shall receive forward current 20mA.
interface.software: The LED shall be blinking at 2 second interval.
